text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: One, two, three... One... One, two, three, four...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Phew... Huff, huff... Three sets complete... I think that amount of weight should do it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch from the sidelines as Mejiro Ardan goes through her workout.
It's on the lighter side in terms of intensity, and it's clear she's taking
things slowly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In between each exercise, I see her pull out a tablet and swipe the
screen. I wonder what she's doing...

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to pump some iron—whoa! It's packed in here! Uh... are
there any open spaces?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. You can use this space if you'd like. I've just finished my
workout.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Really?! Man, this is my lucky day! Thanks a lot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You're very welcome. Now then, I'll be on my way.

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: Wait, she's done already? But she just got here!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Well... She's not the healthiest, right? Maybe that's the best she can
do.

text_block_list.name: Rookie Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She may be a Mejiro, but her poor health overshadows her family
line...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. Forcing her to push herself would be dangerous too... She's
just not built for the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Tazuna was right. The trainers obviously don't believe Ardan
has what it takes to be a racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that thought, I decide to follow Mejiro Ardan out of the gym,
hoping to chat with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As Mejiro Ardan falls to the ground, I rush to her side, steadying her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, my apologies for worrying you. I just felt a little
lightheaded, but I'm fine now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I suppose I worked a little too hard. I was only discharged
yesterda—oh? Where's my tablet?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I scan the area around me, and my eyes fall on a square object right
by my feet—the very tablet I saw Ardan looking at in the gym.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I take the tablet into my hands, the screen lights up, and I'm taken
aback by what I see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Displaying on the screen is a spreadsheet. Under each exercise are
notes on the method, reps, sets, weight used, as well as her tempo...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even at a glance, it's abundantly clear... She's dead set on seeing just
how far she can go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you for picking that up for me... May I have it back now?
choice_data_list: Ah, of course! Sorry about that.
Ah, of course! Sorry about that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan takes back her tablet before walking off. In my stupor, I
completely forgot that I wanted to talk to her. Instead, I just stare as
she takes her leave.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even the standard exercises push her body to the limit, but that
doesn't stop her from trying. That spreadsheet must be only the
beginning of her resolve.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Now hold on... Are you sure, Ardan?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days pass until I see Mejiro Ardan again, where I find her
standing before a very concerned Tazuna.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: There should be an open slot, no? If so, I would like to take it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Please let the staff know that I will be racing in the 1,200-meter on
the dirt course.
choice_data_list: (The dirt course?! And why a sprint?!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe my ears. I've looked into Mejiro Ardan's aptitudes, and
what I'm hearing doesn't—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But you're more suited to medium-distance races on a turf course! I'm
not saying it's impossible for you to win, but your true potential won't
shine through!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Ardan... Perhaps you could wait for the next tryouts in a few months?
That way, you can enter a race better suited to your talents and—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But those "few months" make a world of difference... I believe you
and I are both aware of what I mean.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
We Umamusume can only shine for so long. Once we're race-ready,
our talents can only decline from there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My repeated hospitalizations have prevented me from running in the
tryouts... As such, the time I have after I am race-ready has been
decreased significantly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If I delay my debut any longer, my prime will be over before I can
even dream of the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I... don't want that to happen.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: But!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I understand your concerns, Ms. Tazuna, but my mind is made up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Please proceed with my race registration.
